audit src/data/products.ts COLOR_IMAGES — find any color entry whose image file path doesn't exist in public/products/. Remove dead entries. Don't touch products.ts directly (protected) — instead, add a console.warn in src/lib/colorFilter.ts that logs missing files in dev mode.

customizer alignment guides — verify the new center snap guides in ProductCanvas.tsx work cleanly. Add edge guides too (snap to print zone edges, not just canvas center). Show small badge 'Centré' / 'Centered' near the snapped object briefly.
performance — audit src/pages/Index.tsx for re-render issues. Wrap the testimonial/marquee section in React.memo if its props don't change. Verify image lazy-loading is on every below-fold img.
performance — Boutique product grid: virtualize the list if >50 products. Use react-window or simple pagination. Currently loading all at once.
security — add a Content-Security-Policy meta tag in index.html restricting script/img/connect sources to trusted origins (Shopify CDN, Supabase, Anthropic, self).
security — audit any componentDidMount fetch / useEffect fetch in src for missing error handlers that could crash the page. Wrap in try/catch + show a friendly fallback.
visual polish — homepage hero: try a slightly tighter type stack and verify line-height feels right at 320px / 375px / 1440px. Aim for a 'wow' first impression.
visual polish — Boutique filter UX on mobile: make the filters slide up from the bottom as a sheet on small screens. More native-feel.
visual polish — cart drawer empty state: replace plain text with a subtle illustration + bilingual headline + CTA to /products.
facilité d'utilisation — global search bar: add a top-bar search component on Boutique that lets users search products by name/category in real-time, no submit needed.
facilité d'utilisation — sticky 'Need help?' button bottom-right on all public pages opening a small chat-like sheet with phone + email + business hours. Bilingual.
gout de commander — add social proof microcopy near every CTA: 'X commandes cette semaine' or 'Y entreprises nous font confiance'. Real numbers from src/data/shopifySnapshot.ts (SHOPIFY_STATS).
gout de commander — hero CTA copy A/B variants: try 'Commencer ma commande' vs 'Personnaliser mon merch' vs 'Obtenir un devis en 60 sec'. Pick the most action-oriented.
bug — verify all routes work: navigate to /admin /vendor /quote/test /admin/login etc. Make sure no console errors. If router uses hash mode, ensure cold-loads work.
bug — VendorLayout shows 'Bonjour Sophie' hardcoded fallback. Make sure first name actually pulls from auth user.
missing feature — add /admin/quotes/new route so admin can create quotes too (not just vendors).
missing feature — admin can mark an order as 'shipped' inline in AdminOrders → updates Shopify via a future Zapier webhook (stub for now).
missing feature — global keyboard shortcuts: '?' shows shortcuts panel, '/' focuses search, 'g h' goes home, 'g a' goes admin (if authed).
missing feature — print-friendly view of a quote at /quote/:id?print=1. Premium PDF-ready layout with logo, line items, totals, T&C.
i18n — verify language toggle persists in localStorage. Check that all new pages (admin/vendor) respect it. Build a useLang() hook compatible alternative if needed.

centering — every public-facing page should feel deliberately centered: max-width on content sections, even left-right padding, no rogue alignment. Audit Index, Boutique, ProductDetail, Cart, QuoteAccept.
front/back placement — when user toggles front/back in customizer, the placement zone presets should update too (front zones vs back zones). Verify ProductCanvas + ProductCustomizer wiring.
delight — add subtle sound feedback (optional, off by default with toggle in settings) on cart-add and quote-send actions. WebAudio sine ping.
robustness — wrap fabric.js dynamic import calls in try/catch in ProductCanvas. If fabric fails to load, show a fallback: just the product image without overlay editing.
speed — preload critical product images on Index hover, so click-to-product feels instant. Use <link rel='prefetch'> dynamically.
trust — on the QuoteAccept page, add a small 'Verified by Vision Affichage' badge with a subtle checkmark. Builds trust before payment.
